'''Eshin Worr''' was a member of the [[Intendant caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. An [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|executor]], she oversaw the management of [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. She would do what she could to keep her slaves alive, however, she did not tolerate disobedience.

She was used the her [[tsaisi]]'s [[Poison/Legends|poison]] to punish her slaves, and would let them suffer before applying the antidote. If the slave didn't learn their lesson she would do it again until the slave's will was broken.
